text: Which one of the listed requirements regarding launching appliances for survival craft and rescue boat do not corresponds to present regulation?

options.text: Parts requiring regular maintenance by ships crew shall be readily accessible
The launching mechanism shall be arranged for actuating from a position within the survival craft or rescue boat in addition to a position on the ships deck
All launching appliances shall be capable of recovering survival craft and rescue boats with their crew
Launching appliances shall be constructed for minimum amount of routine maintainance

explanation: Launching appliances are generally designed for launching, not for recovery, with the specific exception of designated rescue boats which must be recoverable.
